subHeadings.chat: Chat with your AI buddy assistant

config.edited: Buddy configuration has been successfully updated

errors.providerUnavailable: The AI provider is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

voiceEnabled.title: Voice Interface
voiceEnabled.description: Enable speech recognition and voice synthesis for hands-free interaction with the assistant

personality.title: Personality
personality.description: Define the buddy's tone, style, and personality. This text is included in the AI system prompt.
personality.placeholder:
You are a helpful smart home assistant. Be concise, friendly, and practical.
Focus on actionable suggestions. Use simple language.

texts.aboutBuddy: Configure the AI buddy assistant that observes your actions, learns your patterns, and suggests automations. Select an AI provider plugin to enable chat functionality. Provider-specific settings (API key, model) are configured in the plugin's own settings page. Without a provider, rule-based suggestions will still work.
texts.emptyChat: Select or create a conversation to start chatting
texts.startConversation: Ask me anything about your home!
texts.providerNotConfiguredHint: Configure an AI provider plugin to start chatting with your buddy.
texts.noProviderSelectedHint: Select and configure an AI provider to get started. Use the Setup Wizard for guided configuration.
texts.providerNotEnabledHint: Enable it in the plugin configuration.
texts.providerMissingConfigHint: Set up the required API key or OAuth connection.
texts.providersFetchFailed: Failed to load available providers. The provider list may be incomplete.
texts.sttProvidersFetchFailed: Failed to load available speech recognition providers. The provider list may be incomplete.
texts.ttsProvidersFetchFailed: Failed to load available voice synthesis providers. The provider list may be incomplete.
texts.moduleDisabledHint: The AI buddy module is currently disabled. Enable it in the system configuration to use chat and suggestions.

wizard.title: Buddy Setup Wizard
wizard.providerDescription: Choose an AI provider to power your buddy's chat capabilities. Each provider requires its own API key or credentials.
wizard.voiceDescription: Optionally configure voice capabilities. Text-to-Speech lets the buddy read responses aloud. Speech-to-Text enables voice input.
wizard.messagingDescription: Optionally connect messaging platforms to chat with your buddy remotely via Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp, or other services.
wizard.noProvidersAvailable: No AI provider plugins are installed. Install a provider plugin (e.g., Claude, OpenAI, Ollama) to enable AI chat.
wizard.doneDescription: Your buddy is ready to use. You can always change these settings later in the configuration page.
